description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular design. The exterior features a combination of white and gray wall panels, with large glass doors and windows on the front and rear facades. The roof has a central rectangular skylight, providing natural light to the interior. On one side, there is a small, partially enclosed patio or terrace area, while the other sides are more solid and windowless. The building sits on a green lawn base, suggesting a suburban or urban residential setting. The overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, with clean lines and a functional layout.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, white and gray exterior, large glass doors, and a central skylight.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with large glass doors and a mix of white and gray wall panels.
description_view_1: Side view with mostly solid gray walls and a small, partially enclosed terrace visible at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting wide glass doors, a red accent feature, and the open terrace area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a solid gray wall, a single window, and a secondary door.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large glass doors and windows on front and rear facades
